records.question: Which movies have a revenue exactly 92913171 and include crew members with the job Stand In?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT movie.movie_id FROM movie
JOIN movie_crew ON movie.movie_id = movie_crew.movie_id
JOIN department ON movie_crew.department_id = department.department_id
WHERE movie_crew.job = 'Stand In' AND movie.revenue = 92913171
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.movie_id
FROM movie m
JOIN movie_crew mc ON m.movie_id = mc.movie_id
WHERE m.revenue = 92913171
AND mc.job = 'Stand In'

records.question: Which movies have exactly 4185 votes and include crew members?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT movie.movie_id FROM movie
JOIN movie_crew ON movie.movie_id = movie_crew.movie_id
WHERE movie.vote_count = 4185
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.movie_id
FROM movie m
INNER JOIN movie_crew mc ON m.movie_id = mc.movie_id
WHERE m.vote_count = 4185

records.question: What movies released on or after 2006-11-22 have the tagline "There glows the neighborhood," a vote count of exactly 109, a vote average of exactly 5.1, and a budget of exactly 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT movie.movie_id FROM movie
WHERE movie.tagline = 'There glows the neighborhood' AND movie.vote_count = 109 AND movie.vote_average = 5.1 AND movie.release_date >= '2006-11-22' AND movie.budget = 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT movie_id
FROM movie
WHERE release_date >= '2006-11-22'
  AND tagline = 'There glows the neighborhood.'
  AND vote_count = 109
  AND vote_average = 5.1
  AND budget = 0

records.question: Which released movies titled Lucky Break have a runtime of at least 107 minutes, a vote average of exactly 6.5, popularity exactly 0.669169, no more than 11 votes, a budget of at most 0, and were released on or after 2001-08-24?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT movie.movie_id FROM movie
JOIN movie_genres ON movie.movie_id = movie_genres.movie_id
WHERE movie.vote_count <= 11 AND movie.movie_status = 'Released' AND movie.runtime >= 107 AND movie.budget <= 0 AND movie.release_date >= '2001-08-24' AND movie.vote_average = 6.5 AND movie.title = 'Lucky Break' AND movie.popularity = 0.669169
records.pred_sql:
SELECT movie_id
FROM movie
WHERE title = 'Lucky Break'
  AND movie_status = 'Released'
  AND runtime >= 107
  AND vote_average = 6.5
  AND popularity = 0.669169
  AND vote_count <= 11
  AND budget <= 0
  AND release_date >= '2001-08-24'

records.question: Which released movies titled RED 2 have a runtime of exactly 116 minutes, a vote average of exactly 6.4, a homepage of http://red-themovie.com/, and at most 1526 votes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT movie.movie_id FROM movie
JOIN movie_genres ON movie.movie_id = movie_genres.movie_id
JOIN movie_crew ON movie.movie_id = movie_crew.movie_id
WHERE movie.runtime = 116 AND movie.vote_average = 6.4 AND movie.homepage = 'http://red-themovie.com/' AND movie.vote_count <= 1526 AND movie.title = 'RED 2' AND movie.movie_status = 'Released'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT movie_id
FROM movie
WHERE title = 'RED 2'
  AND runtime = 116
  AND vote_average = 6.4
  AND homepage = 'http://red-themovie.com/'
  AND vote_count <= 1526
  AND movie_status = 'Released'
